landmarks.spoken: Crossing the South Channel Platte River

landmarks.name: Great Platte River Road Archway
landmarks.spoken: Billboard: Ahead near Kearney, a whole museum arches clear over Interstate eighty -- the Great Platte River Road Archway. You drive right under it. You genuinely cannot miss it.

landmarks.name: Pony Express Station
landmarks.spoken: Billboard: An original Pony Express station ahead in Gothenburg, where teenage riders once swapped horses at a gallop to carry the mail west.

landmarks.name: Golden Spike Tower
landmarks.spoken: Billboard: The Golden Spike Tower ahead in North Platte, above Bailey Yard -- the largest railroad yard on Earth. Watch ten thousand rail cars a day sorted like a giant toy set.

landmarks.name: The Original Cabela's
landmarks.spoken: Billboard: The original Cabela's ahead in Sidney. Where the whole outdoor empire began, with a mountain of gear and an ark's worth of taxidermy watching you shop.
